title: Build Phase 2: thin MCP plugin proxy

log.context: Build Phase 2: thin MCP plugin proxy

Builds cleanly with zero errors, zero dependencies.

Here's what was done:

**Backups created:**
- `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/server.ts.monolithic-backup` (original 1515-line monolith)
- `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/package.json.backup`

**New `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/server.ts`** (190 lines):
- Pure stdio-to-HTTP proxy — reads newline-delimited JSON-RPC from stdin, POSTs to `http://127.0.0.1:9877/mcp`
- Parses SSE `data:` lines from POST responses, writes JSON-RPC to stdout
